positive: A whimsical and highly stylized illustration of a cosmic forest. The scene features giant, bioluminescent mushrooms and intertwined, crystalline branches forming natural walkways. In the center, a playful, stylized nebula creature, resembling a glowing fox mixed with stardust, rests peacefully on a floating lilypad. The aesthetic should be highly detailed, combining Art Nouveau curves with deep space sci-fi elements. Use a limited but striking color palette of sapphire blues, glowing emerald greens, and ethereal purples, contrasted sharply by deep indigo voids. The style should mimic professional vector art combined with digital matte painting, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong contrast for print-on-demand suitability. Central composition, perfect for a t-shirt graphic.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, signature, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, disfigured, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, gradient noise
